pages.text: There was a bird family with three children: Blue, Pink and Yellow. They all lived on a big wise tree called Mamango.

blocks.text: There was a bird family with three children: Blue, Pink and Yellow. They all lived on a big wise tree called Mamango.

pages.text: Mama Birdie’s voice was beautiful! She would wake up early to sing her song.

blocks.text: Mama Birdie’s voice was beautiful! She would wake up early to sing her song.

pages.text: But drought set in on the land. Rivers dried up and leaves fell off.

blocks.text: But drought set in on the land. Rivers dried up and leaves fell off.

pages.text: Mamango thought long and hard. “Maybe we should get the magic worm that brings rain. But who can go?”

blocks.text: Mamango thought long and hard. “Maybe we should get the magic worm that brings rain. But who can go?”

pages.text: “I will go. I am not afraid,” Mama Birdie said.

blocks.text: “I will go. I am not afraid,” Mama Birdie said.

pages.text: Everyone missed Mama Birdie, and her song. Would she ever find her way back home?

blocks.text: Everyone missed Mama Birdie, and her song. Would she ever find her way back home?

pages.text: “What if we sing Mama’s song?” Yellow asked. “Mama said if we sing her song, she will find her way back.” “But I don’t know how to sing!” cried Pink.

blocks.text: “What if we sing Mama’s song?” Yellow asked. “Mama said if we sing her song, she will find her way back.”
“But I don’t know how to sing!” cried Pink.
“Have you tried singing?” Mamango asked.

pages.text: “I have tried singing,” said Yellow. “I can teach you.”

blocks.text: “I have tried singing,” said Yellow. “I can teach you.”

pages.text: Early the next morning, Yellow sang Mama’s song: “It’s a beautifulmorning! We wakeupand shine!” And rain started falling.

blocks.text: Early the next morning, Yellow sang Mama’s song:
“It’s a beautifulmorning!
We wakeupand shine!”
And rain started falling.

pages.text: Eventually, all the birds joined Yellow in song. Mama Birdie found her way back to Happy-Land. And from then on, birds sang at dawn.

blocks.text: Eventually, all the birds joined Yellow in song. Mama Birdie found her way back to Happy-Land. And from then on, birds sang at dawn.
